verifier_values.criteria: Identifies Company_13127_Manufacturing as the top critical exposure borrower for the Manufacturing industry.

verifier_values.criteria_explanation: Calculate the latest liquid cash by doing current balance - RWA amount and then do new- old for latest and earliest value
